channel.title: Typst on Ettore Saggiorato - Sa1g
channel.description: Recent content in Typst on Ettore Saggiorato - Sa1g

item.title: mythographer-5e
item.description:
• Project Repo
  • Typst Universe

Typst template for typsetting documents in the style of the fifth edition of Dungeon&Dragons. This package has been heavily inspired by the awesome work done by the rpgTex team on their DND-5e-LaTeX-Template.

It supports 99% of D&D’s official manual features, automatic translations and it’s highly customizable.
